name: Bassie[mf WILL kill you.]
description:

Will they miss her when she's dead or will they just pretend?
Nobody talks to me, I only talk to I
And I've been telling myself all day, She's gotta die."

"I will hang you, skin you and beat you like a piñata."

"Please?"
